title: centaurium triphyllum var. parviflorum
intro: Centaurium triphyllum var. parviflorum, also known as small-flowered centaury, is a variety of the Centaurium plant, a flowering plant in the gentian family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Centaurium triphyllum var. parviflorum include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. Centaurium triphyllum var. parviflorum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
